240 G4FA G4FA_OTH_RANGE (G4FA) Other Limitation of Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - other limitations or loss - range of motion. 0 = No Limitation, 1 = Limitation on one side, 2 = Limitation on both sides, "-" = Unknown.
